hero.title: Authentic bistro in the heart of Bordeaux

about.title: Bienvenue
about.text1: Since 2007, nestled in the heart of Bordeaux's Saint-Pierre neighbourhood, Bistrot Michel's has been a place for honest cooking, rooted in simplicity, driven by authenticity.
about.text2: Today, Simon, Benjamin and the whole team carry that spirit forward with care, honouring the legacy of Mimi and Manolo, who first breathed life into this place, so that everyone who walks through the door, regular or first-timer, feels right at home.

footer.hours: Open every day from 8:00 AM to midnight
